foods.name: Chicken Curry Thali
foods.description: Rustic village-style spicy chicken curry served with rice, roti, dal, pickle, and salad.

foods.name: Fish Fry Thali
foods.description: Fresh river fish marinated in local spices, shallow fried and served with bhakri and solkadhi.

foods.name: Mutton Rassa Thali
foods.description: Authentic Maharashtrian spicy mutton gravy paired with jowar bhakri and onion chutney.

foods.name: Chicken Handi
foods.description: Slow-cooked country chicken prepared in a clay pot with rich desi masala.

foods.name: Tandoori Chicken (Desi Style)
foods.description: Smoky, charcoal-grilled chicken marinated in village-style yogurt and spices.

foods.name: Anda Curry (Village Egg Curry)
foods.description: Boiled eggs simmered in thick, spicy onion-tomato gravy.

foods.name: Desi Chicken Sukka
foods.description: Dry roasted chicken cooked with coconut and traditional rural spices.

foods.name: Mutton Sukka
foods.description: Tender mutton slow-roasted with fresh ground masala and curry leaves.

foods.name: Prawn Masala
foods.description: Juicy prawns cooked in coastal-style spicy gravy with a hint of coconut.

foods.name: Chicken Biryani (Village Style)
foods.description: Fragrant rice layered with spicy chicken and cooked in traditional dum method.

foods.name: Veg Thali (Gaon Style)
foods.description: Simple and hearty meal with seasonal sabzi, dal, rice, roti/bhakri, pickle, and chutney.

foods.name: Jowar Bhakri with Pithla
foods.description: Soft millet flatbread served with spicy gram flour curry, a true rural classic.

foods.name: Baingan Bharta
foods.description: Fire-roasted brinjal mashed and cooked with onions, tomatoes, and desi spices.

foods.name: Aloo Jeera
foods.description: Simple village-style potatoes sautéed with cumin and fresh coriander.

foods.name: Palak Dal
foods.description: Yellow lentils cooked with fresh spinach and mild rural tempering.

foods.name: Paneer Masala (Desi Style)
foods.description: Cottage cheese cubes simmered in thick, rustic onion-tomato gravy.

foods.name: Bharli Vangi
foods.description: Stuffed brinjals filled with spicy coconut-peanut masala, cooked Maharashtrian style.

foods.name: Vegetable Pulao
foods.description: Fragrant rice cooked with seasonal vegetables and mild whole spices.

foods.name: Sprite
foods.description: Chilled lemon-lime soft drink, perfect with spicy meals.

foods.name: Coca-Cola
foods.description: Classic cold cola to refresh after a heavy thali.

foods.name: Thums Up
foods.description: Strong and fizzy cola with bold taste.

foods.name: Fresh Orange Juice
foods.description: Naturally sweet and tangy seasonal juice.

foods.name: Mango Juice
foods.description: Thick and refreshing mango drink, village favorite.

foods.name: Fresh Lime Soda
foods.description: Sweet or salty nimbu soda with chilled fizz.
